title: satureja ovata
intro: Satureja ovata, also known as the narrow-leaved savory, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Satureja ovata include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and fighting off respiratory infections. Satureja ovata can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and can also be used fresh in cooking and herbal remedies.
